vulnerabilities.description: Permissions-Policy header is missing. This header controls which browser features (camera, microphone, geolocation) the page can use.
vulnerabilities.fix: Add Permissions-Policy header. Example: Permissions-Policy: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=()

vulnerabilities.description: Server header exposes server software: 'github.com'. Attackers can use this to find known vulnerabilities.
vulnerabilities.fix: Remove or obfuscate the Server header in your web server configuration.

vulnerabilities.description: Form #4 (action: https://github.com/signup) reflects user input without sanitization. Payload 'javascript:alert(1)' was found in the response body.
vulnerabilities.fix: Sanitize and encode all user inputs before rendering them in HTML. Use output encoding functions appropriate for the context (HTML, JavaScript, URL, CSS). Implement a strong Content-Security-Policy header.

vulnerabilities.description: Form #5 (action: https://github.com/signup) reflects user input without sanitization. Payload 'javascript:alert(1)' was found in the response body.
vulnerabilities.fix: Sanitize and encode all user inputs before rendering them in HTML. Use output encoding functions appropriate for the context (HTML, JavaScript, URL, CSS). Implement a strong Content-Security-Policy header.
Ensure only necessary ports are open. Review firewall rules.
Ensure only necessary ports are open. Review firewall rules.
Ensure only necessary ports are open. Review firewall rules.

vulnerabilities.description: Path '/administrator' is publicly accessible (HTTP 200). This may expose sensitive data or admin interfaces.
vulnerabilities.fix: Restrict access to '/administrator' using authentication, firewall rules, or server configuration. Remove unnecessary files.

vulnerabilities.description: Found 10 subdomains: www.github.com, admin.github.com, blog.github.com, test.github.com, api.github.com, ns1.github.com, ns2.github.com, docs.github.com, support.github.com, shop.github.com. Each subdomain increases the attack surface.
vulnerabilities.fix: Audit all subdomains. Ensure unused subdomains are removed and all active ones are secured.
